
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position and view, I can see several objects but I need to get closer to better identify the blue circular object. I'll move closer to point P12 which appears to be near a cluster of objects to get a better view.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.86,
  "z": -0.81
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=\-0.65, y=0.08, z=\-0.81\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now I'll look at the objects more carefully to identify the blue circular object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.08,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -0.85
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated visual perception, I can now clearly see a blue circular object that appears to be a ring or donut\-shaped item labeled with tag 57. This matches the description of a "blue circular object" requested by the user. I will now proceed to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "57"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object 57 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=\-0.19, y=0.08, z=\-0.04\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object you requested. The object was tagged as 57 in the environment, and I was able to identify it based on its distinctive blue color and circular shape.
